281 I1BB I1BB_TIA (I1BB) Transient Ischemic Attack CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - nerological - transient ischemic attack (TIA). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
282 I1C I1C_HYPOTHYRD (I1C) Hypothyroidism CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - endocrine/metabolic/nutritional - hypothyroidism. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
283 I1CC I1CC_BRAIN_INJURY (I1CC) Traumatic Brain Injury CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - nerological - traumatic
